tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo I.  Similar to the Tracy Chapman version, the below riff is played throughout the verses.

[tab]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
e|----------------|-------------------|
B|0h1-0-3-----3---|---8---8-7---7-----|
G|0---0-0---0-----|---0--0--0--0---0--|
D|----------------|---------0---------|
A|3---------------|/7-7---------------|
E|------3---------|-------------------|[/tab]

[Intro]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] x4

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
I want a ticket to anywhere.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe we make a deal,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe together we can get somewhere.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Any place is better.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Starting from zero, got nothing to lose.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe we'll make something,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Me myself, I got nothing to prove.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I got a plan to get us out of here:[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I been working at the convenience store,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Managed to save just a little bit of money.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Won't have to drive too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Just 'cross the border and into the city,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You and I can both get jobs[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
And finally see what it means to be living.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 3]

[tab]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You see, my old man's got a problem:[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
He live with the bottle, that’s the way it is.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
He says his body's too old for working,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
His body's too young to look like his.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
My mama went off and left him, she wanted more from life than he could give,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I said, "Somebody's got to take care of him."[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
So I quit school and that's what I did.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
But is it fast enough so we can fly away?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Still gotta make a decision:[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Leave tonight or live and die this way.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
So I remember when: we were driving, driving in your car,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
The speed so fast I felt like I was drunk,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
City lights lay out before us[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And your arm felt nice wrapped 'round my shoulder.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling that I belonged[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 5]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
And we go cruising to entertain ourselves;[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
you still ain't got a job[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
So I work in a market as a checkout girl.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I know things will get better:[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
You'll find work and I'll get promoted,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
We'll move out of the shelter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Buy a bigger house and live in the suburbs.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
So I remember when: we were driving, driving in your car,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
The speed so fast I felt like I was drunk,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
City lights lay out before us[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And your arm felt nice wrapped 'round my shoulder.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling that I belonged[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] x2

[Verse 6]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I got a job that pays all our bills.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
You stay out drinking late at the bar,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
You see more your friends than you do your kids.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I'd always hoped for better,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Thought maybe together you and me would find it,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I got no plans I ain't going nowhere,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
so take your fast car and keep on driving.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
So I remember when: we were driving, driving in your car,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
The speed so fast I felt like I was drunk,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
City lights lay out before us[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
And your arm felt nice wrapped 'round my shoulder.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling that I belonged[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And I   had a feeling I could be someone, be someone, be someone.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[tab]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
e|----------------|-------------------|
B|0h1-0-3-----3---|---8---8-7---7-----|
G|0---0-0---0-----|---0--0--0--0---0--|
D|----------------|---------0---------|
A|3---------------|/7-7---------------|
E|------3---------|-------------------|[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
e|----------------|-------------------|
B|0h1-0-3-----3---|---8---10-8-7--8---|
G|0---0-0---0-----|---0---------------|
D|----------------|------------0------|
A|3---------------|/7-7---------------|
E|------3---------|-------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 7]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You got a fast car.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
But is it fast enough so you can fly away?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You gotta make a decision:[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Leave tonight or live and die this way.[/tab]

[Outro]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] x2
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
